mapper.select: SELECT CAST(rqst_no AS VARCHAR) AS id, title, TO_CHAR(ins_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date FROM board WHERE board_type = 'SERMONS' AND depth = 1 ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT 4
SELECT CAST(rqst_no AS VARCHAR) AS id, title, TO_CHAR(ins_dt, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS date FROM board WHERE board_type = 'ANNOUNCEMENT' ORDER BY ins_dt DESC LIMIT 4
